title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd:
AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd!
